meaning: n.[摄影]硫化硫酸钠,海波,<口>刺激,瘾君子
examples: The performance-based design was adopted and the hypo-safety area as antehall.

The Greek roots of the word can be broken in two hypo and chondria.

Hypo Real estate shares have lost three-quarters of their value since the start of 2008.
